---
title: "Effect Inflation: The Declining Purchasing Power of Published Small-N Findings"
subtitle: "Life with Universally Huge Treatment Effects Would Be a Nightmare"
author: "Rex W. Douglass PhD"
date: "April 15, 2026"
bibliography: references.bib
nocite: "@*"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    number-sections: true
    code-fold: true
    embed-resources: true
    html-math-method: katex
    css: paper.css
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
---

```{=html}
<p class="byline">Rex W. Douglass PhD — <a href="https://www.rexdouglass.com">rexdouglass.com</a> — April 15, 2026</p>
```

{{< include _generated/paper_body.qmd >}}
